headline: BTS creator BANG SI-HYUK wins arrest warrant fight — prosecutors reject police request

slides.subtitle: HYBE chairman cleared for now as prosecutors send case back to police for more evidence
Accused of misleading investors about HYBE IPO plans, pocketing $135 million in secret deal
Police say private equity fund paid Bang ~200 billion won in alleged profit-sharing agreement
Prosecutors say police must build stronger case — Bang barred from leaving South Korea since August
Despite the scandal, BTS is touring the world after their 4-year military hiatus — the show must go on
